summary: Frontend testing complete for vehicle display fix. Verified: Homepage and Véhicules tab both show vehicles in 3-column grid with images, prices, and brand names. Category filters work on both pages. Détails button navigates to vehicle detail page correctly.

issues: SUV filter returns 0 vehicles - may need to verify SUV vehicles exist in database or check vehicle type mapping (uppercase/lowercase)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Vehicle display bug is fixed. Homepage (Accueil tab) and Véhicules tab both display vehicles in 3-column grid layout. Category filters (Tous, SUV, Berline, Citadine, Utilitaire) work correctly. Détails button navigates to vehicle detail page. SUV filter showed 0 results which may indicate no SUV-typed vehicles in current database.

homepage_vehicle_grid.details: 11 vehicles displayed in 3-column grid layout with images, CHF prices, brand names, model names, and spec chips

vehicules_tab_grid.details: Notre Flotte page shows 11 vehicles in 3-column grid with Filtres button and quick filter chips

category_filters_homepage.details: Tous, SUV, Berline, Citadine, Utilitaire chips work. Berline filter correctly reduced count from 11 to 5 vehicles

category_filters_vehicules.details: Filter chips work. SUV filter activated correctly (changed to 0 vehicles - no SUV vehicles in database)

details_navigation.details: Clicking Détails button navigates to /vehicle/{id} page showing full vehicle details (VW Golf 2023, specs, options, Book Now button)

scrolling_shows_all_vehicles.details: All 11 vehicles visible when scrolling the homepage grid
